acceptanceReviewed.criterion: docs/CROSS_DEVICE_VALIDATION.md documents the product QUIC receiver-first sequence and evidence layout.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The shared runbook now documents PRODUCT-QUIC-READY, receiver and sender commands, certificate exchange, product QUIC artifacts, result shape, and non-claims.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux sender duties are documented with evidence and issue update expectations.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/LINUX_ORCHESTRATOR.md includes the sender command, receiver certificate dependency, evidence list, and PRODUCT-QUIC-SENDER-COMPLETE issue template.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Mac receiver duties are documented without Nix.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/MACOS_ORCHESTRATOR.md uses native cargo/just commands and lists receiver artifacts including server-cert.der and server-cert.sha256.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: qd completion behavior for cross-device nodes is explicit.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md now allows blocked real-world validation status and adds a cross-device completion checklist.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No runtime, decode, render, presentation, or latency claim is made.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The diff is limited to documentation, roadmap export, and qd evidence/report files; the product QUIC run remains blocked pending Mac receiver evidence.
